name: OllamaAI
short: AI-powered chat cog using Ollama for fully local LLM responses.
description: A feature-rich AI chat cog that connects to a local Ollama instance to provide conversational AI responses in your Discord server. Supports per-guild configuration, personality/system prompts, conversation memory, trigger words, DM responses, model switching, temperature control, and mention-based replies. All AI processing runs locally via Ollama — no API keys or external services required.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild configuration (Ollama URL, model name, temperature, max tokens, system prompt, trigger words, toggle states) and short-term conversation history in memory. Conversation history is not persisted to disk and is lost on cog unload or bot restart. No user data is sent to external services; all AI inference is performed against a user-configured local Ollama instance.
install_msg:
OllamaAI has been installed!

Make sure Ollama is running locally (`ollama serve`) and you have pulled a model (e.g. `ollama pull llama3.1`).

Run `[p]ollamaset model llama3.1` to configure your model and `[p]ollamaset url http://localhost:11434/api/generate` if your Ollama URL differs from the default.

Use `[p]help OllamaAI` to see all available commands.
author: YourName
